'''âs-ng-z''' ('''kasangaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quant|quant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quant|quant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-ng-z
|-
! Lemma
| kasangaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisangaz|thisangaz]] || [[word:jisangaz|jisangaz]] || [[word:shisangaz|shisangaz]] || [[word:kisangaz|kisangaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusangaz|thuthusangaz]] || [[word:jujusangaz|jujusangaz]] || [[word:shushusangaz|shushusangaz]] || [[word:kukusangaz|kukusangaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusangaz|thusangaz]] || [[word:jusangaz|jusangaz]] || [[word:shusangaz|shusangaz]] || [[word:kusangaz|kusangaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusangaz|thusangaz]] || [[word:jusangaz|jusangaz]] || [[word:shusangaz|shusangaz]] || [[word:kusangaz|kusangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesangaz|thesangaz]] || [[word:jesangaz|jesangaz]] || [[word:shesangaz|shesangaz]] || [[word:kesangaz|kesangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosangaz|thothosangaz]] || [[word:jojosangaz|jojosangaz]] || [[word:shoshosangaz|shoshosangaz]] || [[word:kokosangaz|kokosangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosangaz|thosangaz]] || [[word:josangaz|josangaz]] || [[word:shosangaz|shosangaz]] || [[word:kosangaz|kosangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosangaz|thosangaz]] || [[word:josangaz|josangaz]] || [[word:shosangaz|shosangaz]] || [[word:kosangaz|kosangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsangaz|thĂŠsangaz]] || [[word:jĂŠsangaz|jĂŠsangaz]] || [[word:shĂŠsangaz|shĂŠsangaz]] || [[word:kĂŠsangaz|kĂŠsangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasangaz|thathasangaz]] || [[word:jajasangaz|jajasangaz]] || [[word:shashasangaz|shashasangaz]] || [[word:kakasangaz|kakasangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasangaz|thasangaz]] || [[word:jasangaz|jasangaz]] || [[word:shasangaz|shasangaz]] || [[word:kasangaz|kasangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasangaz|thasangaz]] || [[word:jasangaz|jasangaz]] || [[word:shasangaz|shasangaz]] || [[word:kasangaz|kasangaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasangaz|shasangaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasangaz|goshasangaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasangaz|gokishasangaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasangaznĂŒ|shasangaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasangaznknĂŒ|goshasangaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangaznĂŒ|gokishasangaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasangazshĂ«|shasangazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasangaznkshĂ«|goshasangaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasangazshĂ«|gokishasangazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangazro|shasangazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangaznkro|goshasangaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangazro|gokishasangazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangazmu|shasangazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangaznkmu|goshasangaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangazmu|gokishasangazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasangazsher|shasangazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasangaznksher|goshasangaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasangazsher|gokishasangazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasangazng|shasangazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasangaznkng|goshasangaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasangazng|gokishasangazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasangazya|shasangazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasangaznkya|goshasangaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasangazya|gokishasangazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasangazyam|shasangazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasangaznkyam|goshasangaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasangazyam|gokishasangazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangaznĂŒshĂ«|shasangaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshasangaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishasangaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangaznĂŒro|shasangaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangaznknĂŒro|goshasangaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangaznĂŒro|gokishasangaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangaznĂŒmu|shasangaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangaznknĂŒmu|goshasangaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangaznĂŒmu|gokishasangaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangazshĂ«nĂŒ|shasangazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasangaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasangazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangazshĂ«ro|shasangazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangaznkshĂ«ro|goshasangaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangazshĂ«ro|gokishasangazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangazshĂ«mu|shasangazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangaznkshĂ«mu|goshasangaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangazshĂ«mu|gokishasangazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangazronĂŒ|shasangazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangaznkronĂŒ|goshasangaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangazronĂŒ|gokishasangazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangazroshĂ«|shasangazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangaznkroshĂ«|goshasangaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangazroshĂ«|gokishasangazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangazromu|shasangazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangaznkromu|goshasangaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangazromu|gokishasangazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangazmunĂŒ|shasangazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangaznkmunĂŒ|goshasangaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangazmunĂŒ|gokishasangazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangazmushĂ«|shasangazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangaznkmushĂ«|goshasangaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangazmushĂ«|gokishasangazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangazmuro|shasangazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangaznkmuro|goshasangaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangazmuro|gokishasangazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
